title: The one who Slashes
description: For nearly the last 2 months I've been creating this brand NEW! dweller mod and it is absolute Nightmare fuel not only can he climb but he can also mimic your voice....
body:
For nearly the last 2 months ive been creating this brand NEW! dweller mod and it is absolute Nightmare fuel not only can he climb but he can also mimic your voice aswell as do a jump attack in the caves... Iron doors also dont protect you because he has a AI that adapts and learns from you. this is a CAVE DWELLER but he can also spawn on the surface at night so what ever you do dont leave your doors unlocked

*ABILITIES!*

he can climb and crawl up walls as well as do a jump attack you also need to be quiet because he can actualy hear you he also breaks doors and glass

*THE DEVELOPERS!*

Thanks for everyone on my dev team for helping make this possible and for all the time and effort they put into it...
Animator/model desighner : https://www.curseforge.com/members/slimeforgestudios/projects
Developer/coder : Nikuhaku ( can be found in the Mod Dev Zone discord server )

 

This also Requires GeckoLib v 4.4.4+ to work and for him to be able to mimic you you need to enable Simple Voice Chat ingame this is a v 1.20.1 mod.
